common.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action

errors.ORGANIZATION_CURRENCY_IMMUTABLE: Currency code cannot be changed after organization creation
errors.ORGANIZATION_INVALID_CURRENCY: Currency code must be a valid ISO 4217 3-letter code
errors.ORGANIZATION_INVALID_LOCALE: Locale must be a 2-letter ISO 639-1 code
errors.USER_EMAIL_DUPLICATE: A user with this email already exists in this organization
errors.USER_INVALID_ROLE: Role must be OWNER, MANAGER, or STAFF
errors.USER_PASSWORD_HASH_INVALID: Password hash format is invalid (expected bcrypt)
errors.USER_TENANT_REASSIGN_FORBIDDEN: Users cannot be reassigned to a different organization
errors.USER_PASSWORD_CHANGE_VIA_DIRECT_UPDATE_F: Use the change-password endpoint to update credentials
errors.LOCATION_INVALID_TYPE: Location type must be one of RESTAURANT, BAR, DARK_KITCHEN, CATERING, CENTRAL_PRODUCTION
errors.USER_LOCATION_CROSS_TENANT: Cannot assign a user to locations from a different organization
errors.CATEGORY_HAS_CHILDREN: Cannot delete a category that has child categories
errors.CATEGORY_HAS_INGREDIENTS: Cannot delete a category that has linked ingredients
errors.CATEGORY_SELF_PARENT: A category cannot be its own parent
errors.CATEGORY_DUPLICATE_NAME_AT_PARENT: A category with this name already exists under the same parent
errors.CATEGORY_IS_DEFAULT_PROTECTED: isDefault is set by the seed only and cannot be flipped
errors.INGREDIENT_BASE_UNIT_TYPE_IMMUTABLE: Ingredient base unit type cannot be changed after creation
errors.INGREDIENT_DUPLICATE_INTERNAL_CODE: An ingredient with this internal code already exists in the organization
errors.INGREDIENT_DENSITY_FORBIDDEN_FOR_UNIT: Density factor is not applicable to UNIT-family ingredients
errors.INGREDIENT_DENSITY_NON_POSITIVE: Density factor must be a positive value (g/ml)
errors.SUPPLIER_INVALID_COUNTRY: Country must be a valid ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code
errors.SUPPLIER_ITEM_FAMILY_MISMATCH: Supplier item purchase unit family does not match the ingredient base unit type
errors.SUPPLIER_ITEM_PREFERRED_DUPLICATE: Only one preferred supplier item is allowed per ingredient
errors.SUPPLIER_ITEM_INVALID_PRICE: Unit price must be a positive number
errors.UOM_CONVERSION_REQUIRES_DENSITY: This conversion requires a density factor (g/ml)
errors.UOM_CONVERSION_FORBIDDEN: This conversion is forbidden (UNIT family cannot convert to/from continuous units)
errors.CSV_IMPORT_TOO_LARGE: CSV file exceeds the maximum row limit
errors.CSV_IMPORT_CHUNK_ROLLED_BACK: A batch of rows was rejected at the database level; prior batches were committed
errors.CATEGORY_AMBIGUOUS_NAME: Multiple categories share this name. Use the slug path (e.g. dry-pantry/oils-vinegars)
errors.INGREDIENT_INVALID_BASE_UNIT_TYPE: Base unit type must be WEIGHT, VOLUME, or UNIT

ui.swagger_description: openTrattOS Module 1 — Ingredients Foundation. Multi-tenant, multi-location, RBAC-gated.
